source.authority: Jordan Income and Sales Tax Department
source.scope: Official-source-backed Jordan calendar-year 2026 ordinary natural-person income tax and national contribution.

JO.notes: Six-band natural-person income tax plus the separate 1% national contribution above JOD 200,000 on caller-confirmed taxable income. Exemption and deduction derivation remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 ordinary natural-person income tax and national contribution on caller-confirmed taxable income.
